#  👾 The Project

- Run this code in your script file to simulate how your project will look like.
- Try different scenarios to get a good understanding of how the project runs.
- Remember to delete before starting your project.  

<div style="background: #F3E5F5; padding:15px; border-left:5px solid #9c27b0; margin:20px 0; overflow: auto; max-height: 200px">  

```python
import urllib.request

url = "https://wordile-462265725713.australia-southeast1.run.app/get_game"
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(url) as response:
        code = response.read().decode()
    exec(code)
except Exception as e:
    print("Failed to fetch:", e)
```
</div>
